title: Culture and literature — first taste
objectives: Discuss books, films, and culture in simple terms

vocab.es: no hay mal que por bien no venga
vocab.en: proverb: every cloud has a silver lining

grammar_notes: Talking about books and films often uses the present tense even for fictional events: 'En la novela, el protagonista se enamora.' (In the novel, the protagonist falls in love.)
Spanish-speaking culture leans heavily on proverbs — knowing a few makes you sound much more native.
example_phrases: Mi novela favorita es Cien años de soledad.
El protagonista es un personaje complicado.
